name: Cash and Accounts Payable
short_description: Calculates a company's net cash position by subtracting accounts payable from available cash.

name: Balance Sheet Equation
short_description: Calculates a company's equity given its total assets and total liabilities, based on the fundamental accounting equation.

inputs.name: assets
inputs.description: Total value of the company's assets.

inputs.name: liabilities
inputs.description: Total value of the company's liabilities.

name: Inventory Turnover Days
short_description: Measures how quickly a company sells and replaces its inventory over a period, indicating the average number of days items remain in stock.

inputs.name: opening_inventory
inputs.description: Value of inventory at the beginning of the accounting period.

inputs.name: purchases
inputs.description: Total value of inventory purchased during the accounting period.

inputs.name: closing_inventory
inputs.description: Value of inventory at the end of the accounting period.

name: Adjusted Current Ratio Calculation
short_description: Calculates the change in a company's current ratio after reclassifying a portion of long-term liability as a current liability.

inputs.name: current_assets
inputs.description: The total value of a company's current assets.

inputs.name: current_liabilities
inputs.description: The total value of a company's current liabilities.

inputs.name: reclassified_amount
inputs.description: The portion of a long-term liability that becomes due within the next 12 months and is reclassified as current.

name: Goodwill Computation in Business Combination
short_description: Models a business combination where Company A acquires Company B, paying cash and issuing shares. Company B's identifiable assets and liabilities are valued at fair values. Calculates the goodwill arising from the acquisition.

inputs.name: cash_paid
inputs.description: Cash paid as part of the acquisition consideration

inputs.name: shares_issued
inputs.description: Number of shares issued as part of the acquisition consideration

inputs.name: land
inputs.description: Fair value of land acquired from Company B

inputs.name: inventory
inputs.description: Fair value of inventory acquired from Company B

inputs.name: patents
inputs.description: Fair value of patents acquired from Company B

inputs.name: borrowings
inputs.description: Fair value of borrowings assumed from Company B

inputs.name: payables
inputs.description: Fair value of trade payables assumed from Company B
